item.title: Context-aware transcript quantification from long-read RNA-seq data with Bambu
item.description: Nature Methods — Chen, Sim, Wan, Yeo, Lee, Ling, Love, Göke

item.title: Identification of cell barcodes from long-read single-cell RNA-seq with BLAZE
item.description: Genome Biology — You, Prawer, De Paoli-Iseppi, Hunt, Parish, Shim, Clark

item.title: Accurate isoform discovery with IsoQuant using long reads
item.description: Nature Biotechnology — Prjibelski, Mikheenko, Joglekar, Smetanin, Jarroux, Lapidus, Tilgner
